description: H10: SwiGLU MLP (replace ReluSquared with SiLU-gated linear unit)
H12: Learned Soft-Shrinkage Activation (ShrinkReLU) - shifted ReLU threshold
H13: Divisive Normalization in Attention Output (gain control on attention output)
H16: Learned RMSNorm Gain (Affine RMSNorm) - stacked with ShrinkReLU
H17: Per-Head Attention Output Scaling (HeadScale) - INVALID: stale torch.compile cache from SwiGLU
H20: Learned Per-Layer Norm Scaling (NormScale) - INVALID: stale torch.compile cache from SwiGLU
H18: Learned Sublayer Output Scaling (SubScale) - INVALID: stale torch.compile cache from SwiGLU
H19: Learned Output Softcap Temperature stacked with ShrinkReLU
